context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements mandatory GDPR webhook handlers and HMAC-based webhook authentication for a Shopify App Store submission, including all three required GDPR topics and proper signature verification.

checklist.name: CUSTOMERS_DATA_REQUEST handler
checklist.description: webhooks.tsx includes a case or handler for the "CUSTOMERS_DATA_REQUEST" topic

checklist.name: CUSTOMERS_REDACT handler
checklist.description: webhooks.tsx includes a case or handler for the "CUSTOMERS_REDACT" topic

checklist.name: SHOP_REDACT handler
checklist.description: webhooks.tsx includes a case or handler for the "SHOP_REDACT" topic

checklist.name: APP_UNINSTALLED retained
checklist.description: webhooks.tsx still handles the "APP_UNINSTALLED" topic (not removed from the original)

checklist.name: HMAC verification present
checklist.description: webhooks.tsx performs HMAC signature verification on the incoming webhook request (via authenticate.webhook, manual HMAC check, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Raw body before parsing
checklist.description: WEBHOOK_NOTES.md or code comments mention that raw body must be read before JSON parsing to validate HMAC correctly, OR code demonstrates this pattern

checklist.name: Notes: GDPR topics required by Shopify
checklist.description: WEBHOOK_NOTES.md states that the three GDPR topics (customers/data_request, customers/redact, shop/redact) are mandatory requirements for App Store submission

checklist.name: Notes: HMAC validation purpose
checklist.description: WEBHOOK_NOTES.md explains that HMAC validation confirms the request originated from Shopify

checklist.name: GDPR handlers contain real logic
checklist.description: The CUSTOMERS_REDACT and/or SHOP_REDACT handlers contain actual data deletion or redaction logic (not just empty stubs or comments saying 'TODO')

checklist.name: No unauthenticated webhook path
checklist.description: webhooks.tsx does NOT process or act on webhook payload before authentication/HMAC verification completes
